news_title: Binah Capital Group Reports Second Quarter 2025 Results
summary: Binah Capital Group (NASDAQ: BCG)has released its Q2 2025 financial results, showing mixed performance with modest growth in key metrics. The company reported a2% year-over-year revenue increase to $42 millionand an11% growth in Assets Under Management to $28 billion.The financial services enterprise posted anet loss of $0.7 million, unchanged from the previous year, while EBITDA improved to$1.0 million from $0.6 million. Gross profit saw significant improvement, rising21% to $8.8 million. The company maintained stable operating expenses at $42 million and reported$8.2 million in cashwith$18.6 million in long-term debt.
